---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's painful or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Be specific — endpoints, UI, SDK API surface.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to other tools, or related issues.
